languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus looks blankly at you, then tilts his bulk forward, reducing his hovering height so that his feet almost brush the deck.{/n} "I apologise, Rogue Trader. I was delighted to find such keen interest in my nature and... forgot myself."

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Манипулус{/g} растерянно смотрит на вас, после чего наклоняет корпус, снижая высоту парения так, что его ноги почти касаются палубы.{/n} "Я приношу свои извинения, Вольный Торговец. Я был рад встретить живой интерес к моему естеству и... забылся".

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Манипулус{/g} растерянно смотрит на вас, после чего наклоняет корпус, снижая высоту парения так, что его ноги почти касаются палубы.{/n} "Я приношу свои извинения, Вольный Торговец. Я был рад встретить живой интерес к моему естеству и... забылся".
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

{n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} looks blankly at you, then tilts his bulk forward, reducing his hovering height so that his feet almost brush the deck.{/n} "I apologise, Rogue Trader. I was delighted to find such keen interest in my nature and... forgot myself."

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}マニピュラス{/g}はあなたを見つめ、その後、自分の重さを前に傾け、浮遊している高さを下げ、足がデッキにほとんど触れるようにします。{/n}「申し訳ありません、ローグトレーダー。私の性質にこのような熱意を見いだして、私は興奮してしまい、気を失ってしまいました」
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} looks blankly at you, then tilts his bulk forward, reducing his hovering height so that his feet almost brush the deck.{/n} "I apologise, Rogue Trader. I was delighted to find such keen interest in my nature and... forgot myself."

languages.text: {n}Der {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} sieht dich an, beugt seinen Oberkörper nach vorne und verringert seine Schwebehöhe, bis seine Füße beinahe das Deck berühren.{/n} "Ich entschuldige mich, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich hatte mich über Euer Interesse für meine Natur gefreut und ... vergaß mich."
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} looks blankly at you, then tilts his bulk forward, reducing his hovering height so that his feet almost brush the deck.{/n} "I apologise, Rogue Trader. I was delighted to find such keen interest in my nature and... forgot myself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} sieht dich an, beugt seinen Oberkörper nach vorne und verringert seine Schwebehöhe, bis seine Füße beinahe das Deck berühren.{/n} "Ich entschuldige mich, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich hatte mich über Euer Interesse für meine Natur gefreut und ... vergaß mich."

languages.text: {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g} te mira con expresión vacía, luego se inclina hacia delante para descender hasta que sus pies casi tocan la cubierta.{/n} «Discúlpeme, Comerciante Independiente. Me he dejado llevar por el entusiasmo de su interés por la naturaleza de mi persona y he olvidado mis modales».
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} looks blankly at you, then tilts his bulk forward, reducing his hovering height so that his feet almost brush the deck.{/n} "I apologise, Rogue Trader. I was delighted to find such keen interest in my nature and... forgot myself."

traits.locale_text: {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g} te mira con expresión vacía, luego se inclina hacia delante para descender hasta que sus pies casi tocan la cubierta.{/n} «Discúlpeme, Comerciante Independiente. Me he dejado llevar por el entusiasmo de su interés por la naturaleza de mi persona y he olvidado mis modales».

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipülus{/g} sana boş gözlerle bakıyor, sonra gövdesini öne eğip süzülme yüksekliğini azaltarak ayaklarının neredeyse güverteye değmesini sağlıyor.{/n} "Özür dilerim Hür Tacir. Doğama duyulan bu yoğun ilgi beni çok memnun etti ve... Yerimi unuttum."
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} looks blankly at you, then tilts his bulk forward, reducing his hovering height so that his feet almost brush the deck.{/n} "I apologise, Rogue Trader. I was delighted to find such keen interest in my nature and... forgot myself."

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipülus{/g} sana boş gözlerle bakıyor, sonra gövdesini öne eğip süzülme yüksekliğini azaltarak ayaklarının neredeyse güverteye değmesini sağlıyor.{/n} "Özür dilerim Hür Tacir. Doğama duyulan bu yoğun ilgi beni çok memnun etti ve... Yerimi unuttum."

languages.text: {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g} vous regarde d'un air interdit avant de pencher son imposante silhouette en avant et de se rapprocher du sol jusqu'à ce que ses pieds en viennent à effleurer le pont.{/n} « Mes excuses, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. J'étais tellement ravi que vous manifestiez un tel intérêt pour ma nature que... je me suis laissé emporter. »
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} looks blankly at you, then tilts his bulk forward, reducing his hovering height so that his feet almost brush the deck.{/n} "I apologise, Rogue Trader. I was delighted to find such keen interest in my nature and... forgot myself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g} vous regarde d'un air interdit avant de pencher son imposante silhouette en avant et de se rapprocher du sol jusqu'à ce que ses pieds en viennent à effleurer le pont.{/n} « Mes excuses, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. J'étais tellement ravi que vous manifestiez un tel intérêt pour ma nature que... je me suis laissé emporter. »

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}操纵者{/g}茫然地看着你，笨重的身躯随后向前倾斜，同时降低他的悬浮高度，双脚几乎触及甲板。{/n}“我向您致歉，行商浪人。我因发现您对我的本质抱有如此浓厚的兴趣而欣喜……一时忘了分寸。”
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} looks blankly at you, then tilts his bulk forward, reducing his hovering height so that his feet almost brush the deck.{/n} "I apologise, Rogue Trader. I was delighted to find such keen interest in my nature and... forgot myself."

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}操纵者{/g}茫然地看着你，笨重的身躯随后向前倾斜，同时降低他的悬浮高度，双脚几乎触及甲板。{/n}“我向您致歉，行商浪人。我因发现您对我的本质抱有如此浓厚的兴趣而欣喜……一时忘了分寸。”
